chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-854 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Mr. Zohaib Hassan Pahore, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. == Learned counsel Mr. Muhammad Sharif R Awan, files power on behalf of respondent No.9 which is taken on record. Respondent No.9 Zulfiqar Ali along-with his daughter minor Baby Azal Fatima is present and states that he is ready to allow meetings of the minor with her mother (applicant Mst. Ambreen) on every 15th day for two hours. Learned counsel for applicant also points out that Suit has been filed before the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-XII Hyderabad for maintenance which is fixed on 14.02.2025. Applicant Mst. Ambreen is also present in Court and in view of the statement given by the respondent, the Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed in the above terms. The parties would be at liberty to avail their remedies before the Court(s) having jurisdiction, in accordance with law, if so advised. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
